title: CommentMinerRecord
description: Structured extraction output from the comment-miner agent for one video's comments

pain_points.description: Distinct problems or frustrations expressed by commenters. Specific and actionable.

feature_requests.description: Capabilities or product features explicitly or implicitly requested in comments

audience_portrait.description: 2–3 sentence synthesis of who is commenting: their life situation, struggles, and language

slang_and_phrases.description: Verbatim phrases or slang terms the audience uses. Minimum 5 phrases. Copy exact wording.

ready_hooks.description: Hooks derived from commenter language that could open a video. Under 10 words ideally.

commercial_intent.description: Comments signaling purchase intent, product curiosity, or willingness to pay. Quote or paraphrase.

pain_density_score.description: Fraction of comments expressing a problem, desire, or request vs. pure reactions

total_comments_analyzed.description: Number of comments that were analyzed

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this extraction was produced
